tagline.zh: 影視製作流程AI集成平台 · 沉浸式實驗室 · 應用程式 & 插件
tagline.en: Film production workflows AI integration platform · Immersive systems · Apps & Plugins

about.zh: 擅長問題拆解與解決方案設計。十餘年橫跨影視製作與軟體工程。系統設計、產品開發、沉浸式互動與 AI 工作流。
about.en: Skilled in problem decomposition and solution design. Over a decade spanning film production and software engineering. System architecture, product development, immersive interaction, and AI workflows.

lead.zh: 資料驅動的影視製作系統和 pipeline 串接。包含 Datacenter、本地 AI 摘要與自然語言查找、OCR 分析，以及影視製作軟件插件整合。
lead.en: Data-driven film production systems and pipeline integration—including Datacenter, on-prem AI summarization and natural-language search, OCR analysis, and plugins for production software.

lead.zh: 線下沉浸式體驗系統——互動、敘事與現場工程的交會。
lead.en: Offline immersive experience systems—where interaction, narrative, and live engineering meet.

lead.zh: 產品型 App、小工具與擴充——從體驗到後端，以及解決具體問題的快速作品。
lead.en: Product apps, utilities, and plugins—from experience to backend, plus quick tools for concrete problems.

blurb.zh: 影視製作資料中樞——流程、檔案與工具的統一調度與串接。
blurb.en: Production data hub—orchestrating workflows, files, and tools in one connected system.

role.zh: 系統設計 · 整合開發

blurb.zh: AI NAS——本地端 AI 智能歸檔與查找系統。
blurb.en: AI NAS—on-prem AI-powered smart archive and search.

role.zh: 本地 AI · 歸檔查找

title.zh: 影像製作 Apps & 插件

blurb.zh: 可選工具：DaVinci Resolve 匯入／匯出圖表報表、自動挑條排程校驗拷貝、自動套片 App、OSS 權限管理。
blurb.en: Optional tools: DaVinci Resolve import/export charts & reports, auto selects / schedule / verify / copy, auto conform app, and OSS permission management.

blurb.zh: 沉浸式體驗劇場——互動、敘事與現場工程的交會。
blurb.en: Immersive experience theater—where interaction, narrative, and live engineering meet.

blurb.zh: 沉浸式體驗劇場——互動、敘事與現場工程的交會。
blurb.en: Immersive experience theater—where interaction, narrative, and live engineering meet.

blurb.zh: 沉浸式體驗劇場——互動、敘事與現場工程的交會。
blurb.en: Immersive experience theater—where interaction, narrative, and live engineering meet.

blurb.zh: 語音陪伴與互助平台——原生 iOS、即時語音、點數帳本與多語言。
blurb.en: Voice companionship and mutual-aid platform—native iOS, realtime voice, points ledger, and multilingual.

blurb.zh: 本機 iOS App——自動整理上傳的照片與 PDF 預定行程單，以問答引導，結合老經驗旅者的 skill 教你行李怎麼帶，讓每一次出行都輕巧舒適。
blurb.en: On-device iOS app—auto-organizes uploaded photos and PDF itineraries, guides you with Q&A, and packs traveler know-how so every trip stays light and comfortable.

blurb.zh: 輕量陪伴數位替身App——輕量陪伴、數位替身與情感支持。
blurb.en: Lightweight companion digital surrogate app—lightweight companionship, digital surrogate, and emotional support.

blurb.zh: 快速去除圖片／影片水印的小工具。
blurb.en: A lightweight tool for removing watermarks from images and video.

blurb.zh: Electron 桌面應用——備份並整理 iPhone 照片。
blurb.en: Electron desktop app—back up and organize photos from iPhone.
